title: Teltonika RUTM56 Dual 5/4G Modem Router
description: RUTM56 is a dual 4G/5G router designed for critical applications, featuring 1x 5G and 1x 4G modem and 1x WAN port. The device has two SIM slots, supports eSIM , and is compatible with SA and NSA 5G architectures, ensuring high-speed and uninterrupted connectivity. Wi-Fi 5 and 4x Gigabit Ethernet guarantee sufficient performance, while RutOS handles system configuration. RUTM56 is RMS compatible and ideal for secure and efficient remote management DUAL MODEM: Ensures continuous operation by providing seamless fallback DUAL SIM & eSIMâ¢: Switches to backup connectivity (SIM2) in case of primary connection failure (SIM1) SA & NSA: Supports Stand Alone and Non-Stand Alone networks COMPATIBILITY: Backward compatible with 3G and 2G networks Device 14 W power supply 6 x 5G mobile antenna (magnetic, SMA male) 2 x Wi-Fi antenna (magnetic, RP-SMA male, 1.5 m cable) 1 x GNSS antenna (adhesive, SMA male, 3 m cable) Ethernet cable (1.5 m) SIM adapter kit QSG (Quick Start Guide)
